session.task: Rebrand AgentBoard README and docs to be distinctly different from cursor-session-tracer

events.reason: Rewrote README with completely different framing — positioned as 'dev analytics dashboard' not 'observability layer'. Removed all shared language with cursor-session-tracer (agentic amnesia, OpenTelemetry analogy, MCP tools table, trace file structure). Added comparison table showing how the two repos differ. Updated all docs to match new voice.
